display_text: Titan Sliver, Tier 1: Neutral item providing scaling bonuses to base attack damage and status resistance. The bonuses increase as the game progresses, making it a valuable early-to-mid game pickup for heroes who benefit from both damage and durability against disables. Stats: Base Attack Damage: +15%/+25%, Status Resistance: +10%/+15%.
